zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Clifford於1421年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比時，她的父親Sir John Clifford32歲，母親Elizabeth Percy26歲。她於1447年與Sir Philip Wentworth在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1478年10月4日在英國素福爾可易普斯維其享年57歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可易普斯維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Clifford于1421年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比时，她的父亲Sir John Clifford32岁，母亲Elizabeth Percy26岁。她于1447年与Sir Philip Wentworth在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1478年10月4日在英国素福爾可易普斯維其享年57岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可易普斯維其。

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Clifford was born in 1421, in Appleby, Westmorland, England, her father, Sir John Clifford, was 32 and her mother, Elizabeth Percy, was 26. She married Sir Philip Wentworth in 1447, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 4 October 1478, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Ipswich, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Clifford est née en 1421, à Appleby, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Clifford, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Percy, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Philip Wentworth en 1447, à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 octobre 1478, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Clifford 1421 in Appleby, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Clifford 32 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Percy 26. Sie hat 1447 in Skelton, Yorkshire, England Sir Philip Wentworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Oktober 1478 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Ipswich, Suffolk, England und wurde in Ipswich, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Clifford è nata il nel 1421 nel Appleby, Westmorland, England, sua padre, Sir John Clifford, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Percy, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Philip Wentworth nel 1447, nel Skelton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 ottobre 1478, nel Ipswich, Suffolk, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Ipswich, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Cliffordが1421年にイギリスウエストモーランドアップレビーで生まれた時，父Sir John Cliffordは32歳，母Elizabeth Percyは26歳であった。1447年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンでSir Philip Wentworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1478年10月4日にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで57歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクイプスウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Clifford(이)가 1421년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 애플레비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Clifford(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Percy(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1447년 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 Sir Philip Wentworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 10월 4일 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Clifford nasceu em 1421, em Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Clifford, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Percy, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Philip Wentworth em 1447, em Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1478, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Clifford родилась в 1421 г. в местности эпплеби, вестморланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Clifford было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Percy, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Philip Wentworth в 1447 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 4 октября 1478 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Clifford nació en 1421, en Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Clifford, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Percy, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Philip Wentworth en 1447, en Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1478, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
